creator: keramida@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
The attached patch updates editors/emacs-devel to a newer snapshot from
the CVS repository of Emacs, and it fixes the build WITHOUT_GTK (the old
emacs-devel port uses GTK+ even when WITHOUT_GTK is set).

The WITHOUT_GTK fix was submitted in ports/128513, but I included it in
this update of the port anyway.  IMHO, we should acknowledge the
submitter of ports/128513 too in the commit log of this update (Ashish
Shukla, wahjava at gmail.com).

The same patch is available online (in case gnats makes it difficult to
extract the patch) at:

  http://people.freebsd.org/~keramida/emacs-devel-20081207.patch
